message:
fix(web): QuickStats display - proper sizing and no cut-off

- Remove inline styles causing truncation (host, accession, genes)
- Use semantic CSS classes for modifiers
- Increase base font sizes (labels: 12px, values: 16px)
- Fix mobile styles that were too aggressive (10px fonts!)
- Allow content to size naturally with min-width: max-content
- Add proper host truncation only when needed
- Consolidate mobile styles in desktop-ui.css for consistency

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

@@ -74,11 +74,9 @@ export function QuickStats({ className = '' }: QuickStatsProps): React.ReactElem )} {stats.host && ( -
+

)} @@ -91,9 +89,7 @@ export function QuickStats({ className = '' }: QuickStatsProps): React.ReactElem
